recipes.title: Classic Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: A traditional Italian pizza with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil
recipes.instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F. Roll out dough, add sauce and cheese. Bake for 10-12 minutes. Top with fresh basil.

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Salad
recipes.description: Healthy and delicious grilled chicken salad with fresh vegetables
recipes.instructions: Grill chicken until cooked. Chop vegetables and toss with greens. Top with sliced chicken. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon.

recipes.title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.description: Classic homemade chocolate chip cookies - soft and chewy
recipes.instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Cream butter and sugars. Add eggs and vanilla. Mix flour, baking soda and salt. Fold in chocolate chips. Bake 9-11 minutes.

recipes.title: Vegetable Stir Fry
recipes.description: Quick and healthy Asian-inspired vegetable stir fry
recipes.instructions: Heat sesame oil in wok. Add ginger and garlic. Stir fry vegetables until crisp-tender. Add soy sauce. Serve over rice.

recipes.title: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Flavorful beef tacos with fresh toppings
recipes.instructions: Brown ground beef. Add taco seasoning and water. Simmer until thickened. Fill taco shells with beef. Top with lettuce, tomatoes, cheese, sour cream, and salsa.

recipes.title: Mushroom Risotto
recipes.description: Creamy Italian risotto with mixed mushrooms
recipes.instructions: Sauté mushrooms and set aside. Cook onion and garlic. Add rice and toast. Add wine and broth gradually. Stir in mushrooms, parmesan, and butter.
